If I decided to destroy an awakener's core, let's admit Horla's one. For what could I get charged as awakeners can't really be treated as humans ?
The definition of murder is, from the dictionary "the unlawful premeditated killing of one human being by another."
omg she is even more crazy than I thought 💀 each dialogue becomes more crazy
you would get charged with destruction of property
and depending on how valued awakeners are, it could be massive
so they probably have specific laws attributed to them
also who is to say you are going to get legally punished for destroying an awakeners core
who is to say you will get *legally* punished
Like, you can get charged if you break someone's wall
I dont think you are catching my drift
there is nothing stopping someone from commiting their own vigilante justice on you for basically killing an awakener for good
its not like Mythag is a small organisation either
